title: Saudi Arabian Grilled Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Saudi Arabia, featuring marinated shrimp grilled to perfection on skewers.

ingredients.name: shrimp paste
ingredients.notes: available in most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together shrimp paste, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and pepper.
Add the shrimp to the marinade and mix to coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking. Grill the shrimp skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot with additional lemon wedges on the side, if desired.
